summary: Replay capture layer complete. New core/replay_capture.py captures full decision context per loop. Wired into bot_core.py model bridge section. Sample records generated.
model_input_fields_computed_by_model: p_tracked (inferred win probability for tracked team)
pregame_prob (loaded from Elo table or sharp odds)
confidence (combined model + data quality + spread quality score)
existing_ob_snapshots_analysis: ob_snapshots contains market-specific orderbook history organized by market_id. Captures: bid/ask prices, spread, depth, imbalance, micro_ok checks. Purpose: orderbook depth sampling for execution analysis. replay_captures SUPERSEDES ob_snapshots for replay use case: replay_captures includes full context (game state, model inputs, model outputs, decision), while ob_snapshots only has orderbook snapshots. Both preserved; replay_captures is authoritative for decisions.

capture_implementation.behavior: Appends one JSON record per line to runtime/replay_captures/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl. Creates directory and file on first write. Graceful error handling (logs warning, does not raise).

wiring_points.trigger: After entry gate check decision (TRADE, SKIP_GATE, SKIP_DUPLICATE_SLUG)
wiring_points.fields_captured: ts, loop_id, event_slug, registry_match, orderbook, mark, model_inputs, model_output, discovery_decision

limitations: Game state fields (inning, outs, bullpen status, score) are captured from signal.components, which come from the model's game snapshot. If game state lookup fails in the model, these fields may be None.
pregame_prob is NOT captured (computed by model from Elo/sharp odds lookup). Replay engine must recompute this lookup using same date/teams.
p_home and edge calculations are NOT captured (must be recomputed by replay engine using market prices + model).
GCP-hosted game state service calls are outside bot_core scope; replay engine must have same service access.
files_changed: bot_core.py (import + 3 capture calls in model bridge)
next_steps: Run bot with live markets to populate 2026-04-18.jsonl (actual capture, not sample)
Verify at least 5 records captured during short run
Use REPLAY_HARNESS_BUILD_001 to consume capture files for offline decision replay
Implement retention policy (task notes: gzip files >7 days old at startup)
